module.name: prefer-structured-clone
module.description: Prefer structuredClone(...) over JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(...)) when creating a deep clone.

scenarios.name: should allow JSON.parse calls that do not wrap JSON.stringify
should allow JSON.parse with a reviver
scenarios.then: no violation is reported because the parse call has additional behavior

scenarios.name: should allow JSON.stringify with a replacer
scenarios.then: no violation is reported because the stringify call has additional behavior

scenarios.name: should allow computed JSON method access
scenarios.given: calls that use JSON["parse"](...) or JSON["stringify"](...)
scenarios.then: no violation is reported because only direct JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(...)) is targeted

scenarios.name: should allow JSON.parse with a spread argument
scenarios.then: no violation is reported because the parse call does not provide a direct single expression argument

scenarios.name: should report the canonical JSON deep clone pattern
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the outer call
scenarios.then: a preferStructuredClone violation is reported and autofixed to structuredClone(value)

scenarios.name: should preserve outer call type arguments in the autofix
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the outer call
scenarios.then: a preferStructuredClone violation is reported and autofixed to structuredClone<MyType>(value)

scenarios.name: should report JSON deep clone in nested expressions
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the outer call
scenarios.then: a preferStructuredClone violation is reported and autofixed to structuredClone(buildPayload())

scenarios.name: should report JSON deep clone of an object literal
scenarios.given: a call to JSON.parse(JSON.stringify({ nested: value }))
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the outer call
scenarios.then: a preferStructuredClone violation is reported and autofixed to structuredClone({ nested: value })

scenarios.name: should preserve sequence expressions as a single structuredClone argument
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the outer call
scenarios.then: a preferStructuredClone violation is reported and autofixed to structuredClone((first(), second()))
